name: bydhvs

metadata.name: bydhvs
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 (GPLv3)
metadata.summary: A module for communicating with the BYD HVS Battery system

documentation:
# python-bydhvs
Python Wrapper for BYD b-Box HVM/HVS/LVS

This is a python module to communicate with an BYD HVM/HVS/LVS.

inspired by (https://github.com/christianh17/ioBroker.bydhvs)

If used with **BYD Be Connect** at the same time. This module is **not** working correctly.

Tested with 2 Towers and 5 Modules. Thx @st0ne-dot-at

Installation
------------
The module is available from the [Python Package Index](https://pypi.python.org/pypi)


    $ pip3 install bydhvs

On a Fedora-based system or a CentOS/RHEL host with EPEL.

    $ sudo dnf -y install python3-bydhvs

Usage
-----

The file ``example.py`` contains an example about how to use this module.

Build
-----
To build dev prepare system:

    $ python -m pip install --upgrade pip
    $ pip install build

build package:
  
    $ python -m build

License
-------

``python-byd`` is licensed under GPL-3.0 license, for more details check LICENSE.

modules.name: bydhvs
documentation:
Module for communicating with the BYD HVS Battery system.

This module provides the BYDHVS class, which handles communication with
the BYD HVS Battery over TCP/IP sockets. It implements methods to connect
to the battery, send requests, receive and parse responses, and retrieve
data for use in Home Assistant.

classes.name: bydhvs.BYDHVSError
documentation: Base exception for BYD HVS Battery errors.

classes.name: bydhvs.BYDHVSConnectionError
documentation: Exception raised when there is a connection error.

classes.name: bydhvs.BYDHVSTimeoutError
documentation: Exception raised when a timeout occurs during communication.

classes.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.__init__
documentation: Initialize the BYDHVS communication class.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.connect
documentation: Establish a connection to the battery.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.send_request
documentation: Send a request to the battery.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.receive_response
documentation: Receive a response from the battery.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.check_packet
documentation: Check if the received packet is valid.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.buf2int16_si
documentation: Convert buffer to signed 16-bit integer.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.buf2int16_us
documentation: Convert buffer to unsigned 16-bit integer.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.buf2int32_us
documentation: Convert buffer to unsigned 32-bit integer.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.parse_packet0
documentation: Parse packet 0 containing serial number and firmware versions.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.parse_packet1
documentation: Parse packet 1 containing battery status information.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.parse_packet2
documentation: Parse packet 2 containing battery type and inverter information.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.parse_packet5
documentation: Parse packet 5 containing cell voltage and balancing status.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.parse_packet6
documentation: Parse packet 6 containing additional cell voltages.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.parse_packet7
documentation: Parse packet 7 containing more cell voltages and temperatures.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.parse_packet8
documentation: Parse packet 8 containing additional cell temperatures.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.parse_packet12
documentation: Parse packet 12 for systems with more than 128 cells.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.parse_packet13
documentation: Parse packet 13 for systems with more than 144 cells.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.close
documentation: Close the connection to the battery.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.poll
documentation: Perform a polling cycle to retrieve data from the battery.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.state2_send_request0
documentation: State 2: Send request 0 and parse packet 0.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.state3_send_request1
documentation: State 3: Send request 1 and parse packet 1.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.state4_send_request2
documentation: State 4: Send request 2 and parse packet 2.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.state5_start_measurement
documentation: State 5: Start measurement and proceed with detailed queries.

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.state6_send_request4
documentation: State 6: Send request 4

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.state7_send_request5
documentation: State 7: Send request 5 and parse with parse_packet5 for tower 0

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.state8_send_request6
documentation: State 8: Send request 6 and parse with parse_packet6 for tower 0

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.state9_send_request7
documentation: State 9: Send request 7 and parse with parse_packet7 for tower 0

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.state10_send_request8
documentation: State 10: Send request 8 and parse with parse_packet8 for tower 0

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.state11_send_request9
documentation: Handle additional cells for more than 128 cells (e.g., 5 modules)

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.state12_send_request10
documentation: State 12: Send request 10 - Start measurement

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.state13_send_request11
documentation: State 13: Send request 11

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.state14_send_request12
documentation: State 14: Send request 12 and parse with parse_packet12

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.state15_send_request13
documentation: State 15: Send request 13 and parse with parse_packet13

methods.name: bydhvs.BYDHVS.get_data
documentation: Retrieve the collected data.
Class to communicate with the BYD HVS Battery system.
